Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion And Petition And Motion For An Order Approving Receiver'S Final Inventory Account And Report, For Authority To Sell Property, For Authority To Pay Accounts Pay
Off Calendar Dec-08-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: RECEIVER JOHN B. CHILDRESS' Petition and Motion For An Order Approving Receiver's Final Inventory Account And Report, For Authority To Sell Property, For Authority To Pay Accounts Payable, For Authority To Make Distributions To Partners And Authority To Dissolve And Wind Up Partnership And Discharge Receiver: GRANTED; no opposition filed.
